source: naturally-populated production BrainCore deployment, read-only access
reproduction_dsn: operator-provided (requires access to a populated BrainCore instance)
framing_note: This JSON is a production-corpus measurement against a naturally-populated BrainCore deployment. Unlike the synthetic smoke baseline, this file records live corpus size, latency, and stream wiring on a populated knowledge base. NOTE: relevance_at_10 reads 0.0 because the canonical 12-query set is tuned to the synthetic sample-vault incidents (INC-001/002/003 about server-a docker disk, postgresql replication, ssl cert) which do not exist in the production corpus. The vector stream was disabled for this run. Cite this JSON for corpus.facts, latency_ms, and stream wiring health, NOT for relevance_at_10 or vector retrieval quality.
